feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maintenance workflow stuck in approval + Reject not working as expected
entry.content:
we recently introduced a Team Lead approval step by leveraging Flexible workflow for maintenance orders. we really like the concept but there seems a few flunky things happening with this. might be SAP bug, might be our settings. keen to hear views from others:

- 1 WO in approval phase but not showing up in inbox resp person. also not showing up in flex workflow app as "in process" state. so now sort lost in between. any way to give this WO a push

- reject scenario not cleanly going back to workflow initiator. we want to use Reject (+ comment) so we have a daily feedback loop and become better in workprep each & every day. seems not to work as expect yet. hope somebody from SAP product owners read this and thoroughly checks this as good feature to acheive first-time-right-in-full and reduce E2E process friction in all following processes

entry.title: Cannot create preliminary billing document of Sales order line with item category TAN
entry.content:
The Sales order is not displayed in the app Create Billing Documents. Therefore, it is not possible to create a pro forma invoice before delivering and goods issue of the delivery. 

When item cat CBAB is used, the SO is displayed in create billing documents.

entry.title: Which SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Apps Are Required for Access Log Management?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and need to create a user who is responsible for access log management.

The purpose of this user is to monitor and review system access information, such as:

  • Who logged into the system
  • When they logged in
  • Login history and access activities
  • Other relevant audit/access log information

I would like to understand:

  1. Which SAP apps should this user have access to?
  2. What is the purpose of each app?
  3. Are there any standard business catalogs or business roles that already include these applications?
  4. Is there a recommended SAP best practice for creating an "Access Log Management" or "Audit Log" user in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

QuocDT5

entry.title: Manage Customer Line Items – Net Days and WBS Element not displayed
entry.content:
We are reviewing the standard application Manage Customer Line Items and have identified two behaviors that we would like to validate.

1. Net Days field

The customer uses payment terms with a defined number of net due days. However, in the Manage Customer Line Items application, the Net Days field is always displayed as 0, although the payment terms and due date are correctly maintained in the accounting document.

Our understanding is that the application derives this value from the payment terms and baseline date, but in our tests the field is not populated.

Could you please confirm whether this is the standard behavior of the application? If so, under which conditions is the Net Days field populated?

2. WBS Element field

Customer invoices are created with a WBS Element assigned.

The WBS Element is correctly stored in the accounting document and can be displayed in the Display G/L Line Items application.

However, the WBS Element column remains empty

entry.title: Need option to post mass Purchase requisitions
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need a provision to post mass Purchase Requisitions.

Currently, we are creating more than 50 PRs daily, and each PR contains at least 100 line items. Due to the high volume, manual creation is time-consuming and inefficient.

We request a provision for a mass PR upload template through the migration object or any other suitable method to facilitate bulk creation of Purchase Requisitions.

Kindly review and provide the possible options.

Thank you.

entry.title: Request for Mass Purchase Requisition Upload Provision
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need a provision to post mass Purchase Requisitions.

Currently, we are creating more than 50 PRs daily, and each PR contains at least 100-line items. Due to the high volume, manual creation is time-consuming and inefficient.We request a provision for a mass PR upload template through the migration object or any other suitable method to facilitate bulk creation of Purchase Requisitions.

 

Kindly review and provide the possible options.

Thank you.

entry.title: BP_DATAREPL_FND/006 error when replicating Business Partner from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 to SAP S/
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on the integration scenario 6KO - Opportunity to Order with SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 and I am facing an issue with Business Partner replication from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 back to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Scenario:
SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 → SAP Cloud Integration → SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Issue:
When a Business Partner is modified in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 and the replication is triggered back to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Message Monitoring in S/4HANA shows the error:

BP_DATAREPL_FND / 006

What is already configured:

  • Communication System created in S/4HANA with Business System field filled with the Display ID obtained from the default communication system in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
  • Communication Arrangement SAP_COM_0008 active with the correct Communication System assigned
  • Additional Properties: Integration with C4C enabled = X and No Multiple Address Handling = X
  • Inbound Service active: Business Partner - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (SOAP)
  • Communication User linked to the Communication System and Communication Arrangement
  • iFlow Replicate Business Partner to SAP S4HANA Cloud deployed and running in SAP Cloud Integration

Question:
What could be causing the error BP_DATAREPL_FND/006 with all this configuration in place? Is there any additional configuration needed specifically for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to authorize the inbound replication coming from SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?

Any help or relevant SAP Notes would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How do we delete Project demand
entry.content: In the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system, a demand was created in the Manage Project Demand app with an incorrect name and was immediately closed. However, while attempting to create a new demand with the correct name, the system does not allow it as the activity type is already in use. Kindly advise on how this issue can be resolved.

entry.title: Incoterms based on Ship-to Party
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a business scenario where we need to determine the incoterms based on Ship-to Party than the sold-to. However, standard system does not allow us to do this. Please note, we are not using Transportation management functionality either.

Thanks

entry.title: Alert for pending Depreciation Run before closing a particular period
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

This is to inform you that our client wants a system for alert if any Depreciation posting is pending for current period and in that case, it should not allow to close the period. Please provide a suitable solution for this.

Regards,

Shatabdi

entry.title: S4HC | Batch Check Printing
entry.content:
Hi Sir/Ma'am,

Hi Sir/Ma'am,

We would like to ask for your assistance on what scope items are needed to be activated for Batch Check Printing if this is standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, as well as any documentation, if ever.

Thank you.

 

Sincerely,

Melvin Banggo

entry.title: Flexible Workflow – Multiple Workflow Determination for Purchasing Group and Material Group
entry.content:
Our business requirement is to maintain two different approval groups:

* Approval Group 1: Based on Purchasing Group (e.g., VMU) with Approver 1 and Approver 2.
* Approval Group 2: Based on Material Group with Approver 3 and Approver 4.

For specific Material Groups, the workflow should be routed only to the Material Group approvers (Approver 3 and Approver 4). The Purchasing Group workflow should not be triggered for these Material Groups.

However, when we configure both workflows, both are triggered because the Purchasing Group condition is also satisfied.

entry.title: Add auxiliary packaging material to an existing Handling unit in the Warehouse via API
entry.content:
Hi,
We would like to add auxiliary packaging material to an existing WM Handling unit. 
I found in the constraints that we can't create an HU with Auxiliary packaging material, but it doesn't explicit we can't add them. 
Handling Unit | SAP Help Portal 

In parallel I also created a customer influence ticket for it: 
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/377179

Kr Jeroen

entry.title: Standard API required for Manage Workforce App
entry.content:
We need a standard API to fetch the work agreement details ( Work agreement ID, Start Date and End Date ) and Worker Types details(Worker type, start date and End Date ) from the standard app "MANAGE WORKFORCE" .


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Edit worker data
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Manage Workforce


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "Country/region is not active in your system" when maintaining RITA countries in SSCUI 103464
entry.content:
When attempting to maintain a foreign tax registration country/region in SSCUI 103464 (Activate RITA and Maintain Tax Registration Countries/Regions), the following error may occur:

FOT_TXA080 – Country/region <XX> is not active in your system.

In some cases, the additional message "RITA cannot be activated for country/region *" may also be displayed, even though the country/region is listed as supported for Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F4 for Sales Invoice Header from custom field through custom table
entry.content:
Business has requested for a field named 'Policy Name' with F4 button in Sales Invoice header. Policy name that will be populating in F4 will be maintained in a custom app. We have created a custom table. How we can add this table as an F4 for custom field in VF01/02.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Vendor Evaluation Variance Score in SAP S4hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like to know how are variance scores setting in SAP S4hana public cloud

Please suggest me. 

Regards.

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Cannot use country group in manage allocation
entry.content: I have created the country group from application manage global hierarchies but cannot use with application manage allocation (See attached file)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | CO11N Goods Movement Validation via BAdI
entry.content:
I'm working on a tricky ABAP extensibility challenge in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and would love inputs from anyone who has tackled something similar.

📌 The Business Problem

During Production Order confirmation (CO11N), SAP allows users to freely manipulate the goods movement data before posting - changing storage locations, modifying quantities, adding new components, or outright deleting existing BOM component lines. This is causing serious data integrity issues between our Production Order BOM, reservations, and actual goods movements.

We needed strict validation: what gets posted must exactly match the original BOM and reservation - no exceptions.

What We've Built So Far

We implemented custom validation logic across BAdIs:

✅ Rule 1: Block SLoc change → Working fine in
BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM.
✅ Rule 2a: if Quantity less and great than equal → Working fine.
✅ Rule 3: Block unauthorised component addition → Working fine.

⚠️ Rule 2b: Block quantity change vs. reservation → Partially working (greater/less than caught, but Zero/blank not)

❌ Rule 4: Block component line deletion → NOT implemented yet
This is the hardest one. Since deleted lines never even trigger the per-item BAdI.

What I'm Looking For


Has anyone implemented deletion detection or if quantity zero & blank using BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM in Public Cloud?
Any experience comparing BOM/reservation components against posted movement items at ITEM level?
Any gotchas with I_ProductionOrderComponent or I_ReservationDocumentItem in this context?
Best practices for raising clean error messages from ITEM-level BAdIs in Public Cloud.?

All of this is in S/4HANA Public Cloud ABAP.

If you've tried something similar- whether it worked or not- I'd love to hear about it. Every experience helps.

entry.title: Cloud Application Programming For SAP Functional Consultant
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it required to Lean Cloud application programming language to every functional consultant in this Cloud and AI era.

If yes how to start and if basic understanding required could you please share the links so that can prepare and start the learning.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Ashish
